commands: Expand the analysis of Round Robin to include the impact of the time quantum on response time and throughput, discussing how different quantum values could affect performance.
Clarify the description of Shortest Job First (SJF) by noting that while it is generally non-preemptive, it should be stated that preemptive variants exist and may alter performance outcomes.

Revise the assumption regarding context switching overhead to acknowledge that while it may be low, it is not negligible and can impact overall scheduling performance, especially in high-load scenarios.

Include a discussion of priority inversion in the analysis of Priority Scheduling, highlighting how it can affect fairness and response times in practice, particularly in systems with varying priority levels.
